## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (`README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings (`npm run lint` passes).
- [ ] The build passes (`npm run build` succeeds).
- [ ] I have tested on mobile (< 768px) where applicable.
- [ ] Any new animation respects `prefers-reduced-motion`.
